name: sensorQueueFrame
title: sensorQueueFrame
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorQueueFrame(char[] sysVarNamespace, byte buffer[], dword byteCount);
description: This function is intended to be used for I2C slave simulation. It inserts the given data bytes into the response queue of the given slave.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the slave the data shall be queued in.
